zh.Tengling, Duchy of Bavaria: 德國貝也藍德可萊斯 勞分騰格林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgau於1002年出生在德國時，他的父親Engelbert III. von Chiemgau42歲，母親Adala von Bayern40歲。他去世於1044年7月5日在匈牙利o-莫頌-索普隆o梅o享年42歲。

zh-hans.Tengling, Duchy of Bavaria: 德国貝也藍德可萊斯 勞分騰格林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgau于1002年出生在德国时，他的父亲Engelbert III. von Chiemgau42岁，母亲Adala von Bayern40岁。他去世于1044年7月5日在匈牙利o-莫頌-索普隆o梅o享年42岁。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sieghard

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Victor
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name meaning ‘conqueror’. This was popular among early Christians as a reference to Christ's victory over death and sin, and was borne by several saints. An influence on the choice of the name in more recent times was the American actor  Victor Mature  (  1915–99 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgau was born in 1002, in Germany, his father, Engelbert III. von Chiemgau, was 42 and his mother, Adala von Bayern, was 40. He died on 5 July 1044, in Ménfő, Győr, Győr-Moson-Sopron, Hungary, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgau est né en 1002, à Allemagne, son père, Engelbert III. von Chiemgau, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Adala von Bayern, avait 40 ans. Il est décédé le 5 juillet 1044, à Ménfő, Győr, Győr-Moson-Sopron, Hongrie, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgau 1002 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Engelbert III. von Chiemgau 42 und seine Mutter Adala von Bayern 40. Er starb am 5. Juli 1044 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Ménfő, Raab, Győr-Moson-Sopron, Ungarn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgau è nato il nel 1002 nel Germania, il suo padre, Engelbert III. von Chiemgau, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Adala von Bayern, aveva 40 anni. Morì il 5 luglio 1044, nel Ménfő, Győr, Győr-Moson-Sopron, Ungheria, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Bayern, Saint-Empire romain: クoニグレイチ バイエルン
ja.Menfö/Ungarn: ハンガリーグイoル-モソン-ソプロングイoルムeンフo
ja.Tengling, Duchy of Bavaria: ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ラウフンテングリング
ja.lifeSummary: Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgauが1002年にドイツで生まれた時，父Engelbert III. von Chiemgauは42歳，母Adala von Bayernは40歳であった。彼は1044年7月5日にハンガリーグイoル-モソン-ソプロングイoルムeンフoで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgau(이)가 1002년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Engelbert III. von Chiemgau(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Adala von Bayern(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1044년 7월 5일 헝가리 그이o-모손-소프런 그이o르 e프o에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgau nasceu em 1002, em Alemanha, seu pai, Engelbert III. von Chiemgau, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Adala von Bayern, tinha 40 anos. Ele faleceu em 5 de julho de 1044, em Ménfő, Győr, Győr-Moson-Sopron, Hungria, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgau родился в 1002 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Engelbert III. von Chiemgau было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Adala von Bayern, 40. Он умер 5 июля 1044 г. в местности мeнфo, гиoр, гиoр-мосонсопрон, Венгрия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sieghard VII von Tengling Graf von Chiemgau nació en 1002, en Alemania, su papá, Engelbert III. von Chiemgau, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Adala von Bayern, tenía 40 años. Murió el 5 de julio de 1044, en Ménfő, Győr, Győr-Moson-Sopron, Hungría, a la edad de 42 años.
